tasks.title: Config and models
instructions: In src/config.py: create Settings class using pydantic-settings BaseSettings. Fields: bot_token (str), db_path (str, default='data/tracker.db'), log_level (str, default='INFO'), reminder_hour (int, default=10), reminder_days_threshold (int, default=7), ghosted_days_threshold (int, default=14). Use model_config with env_file='.env'.

In src/models.py: create Status(str, Enum) with values: applied, interview, test_task, offer, rejected, ghosted. Create JobApplication(BaseModel) with fields: id (int), user_id (int), company (str), position (str), url (str | None), status (Status), created_at (datetime), updated_at (datetime).
In tests/test_models.py: test Status enum has 6 values, test JobApplication valid creation, test invalid status rejected, test url is optional.

tasks.title: Storage layer
instructions: Create Storage class with db_path init param. Implement: init_db(), add_application(), get_applications(), update_status(), delete_application(), get_stale_applications(), get_stats(). Define exceptions: ApplicationNotFound, InvalidStatus.
All methods async via aiosqlite. Filter by user_id in every query for data isolation.
Tests: use ':memory:' db fixture. 10+ test functions covering add, get, filter, update, delete, stale, stats, not_found, wrong_user.

tasks.title: Bot entry point and /start handler
instructions: In src/bot.py: async main() that creates Bot, Dispatcher, Storage, registers all handlers, starts polling. Call storage.init_db() on startup.
In src/handlers/start.py: /start and /help return Russian welcome message listing all commands.
Tests: mock Message, verify response contains command names.

tasks.title: /add handler
instructions: Tests: valid with url, valid without url, missing args, quoted company.

tasks.title: /list handler
instructions: Handle /list and /list <status>. Format: '{emoji} #{id} {company} — {position} — {STATUS} ({days}д назад)'. Emoji: applied=📨, interview=🔄, test_task=📝, offer=✅, rejected=❌, ghosted=👻. Stale (>7d) gets ⚠️.
Tests: empty, with data, filtered, stale warning.

tasks.title: /status, /delete, /stats, /remind handlers
instructions: /status <id> <new_status>: update and return card. /delete <id>: delete and confirm. /stats: counts per status. /remind: stale >7 days.

tasks.title: Scheduler
instructions: setup_scheduler(storage, bot): daily job at REMINDER_HOUR. Auto-mark applied >14 days as ghosted. Notify user.
Tests: mock storage/bot, verify status change and notification.

tasks.title: Docker and deploy
instructions: Verify docker-compose build and run. Deploy to Railway or Fly.io. Bot responds from deployed instance.
